hero.eyebrow: Da Nang, Vietnam · Trusted by patients from NZ & Australia
hero.headline: Your best smile.
hero.subheadline: Metal Dental combines internationally trained specialists, hospital-grade technology, and AI-powered support — so you get the dental work you've been putting off, without the Auckland or Sydney price tag.
hero.cta_note: No commitment. No flights booked. Just answers.

services.label: What We Treat
services.heading: Every treatment you need — at a price that makes sense

implants.name: Dental Implants
implants.desc: Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacement. Same leading brands as Auckland clinics — at a fraction of the cost.

cosmetic.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
cosmetic.desc: Porcelain veneers, crowns, and whitening. Digital smile planning so you see your result before we start.

general.name: General Dentistry
general.desc: Routine care, fillings, extractions, root canals. Clinically thorough, with English records sent home.

aligners.name: Clear Aligners
aligners.desc: Straighter teeth with discreet aligner treatment. Start in Da Nang, monitor progress from home.

why.label: Why Da Nang?
why.heading: The same quality. A completely different price.
why.col1_body: Here's what the same treatment costs in New Zealand vs. at Metal Dental in Da Nang. Even after flights and accommodation, most patients save thousands.
why.col2_point1: Same implant brands as your Auckland dentist (Straumann, Nobel Biocare)
why.col2_point2: 3D digital treatment planning — your result mapped before we begin
why.col2_point3: English-speaking team and dedicated international patient coordinator
why.col2_point4: Written treatment records sent to your home dentist
why.col2_point5: Warranty on all restorative and cosmetic work
why.col2_note: Vietnam's lower operating costs are why it's cheaper — not lower quality.

ai.label: Powered by AI
ai.heading: The tools that make dental tourism feel easy
ai.chat_desc: Ask anything, any time — treatments, pricing, what to expect. Our AI responds in seconds, not business hours. It's midnight in Auckland. Your questions don't wait.
ai.preview_desc: Upload a photo of your smile and our AI shows a simulated preview of potential results — veneers, whitening, or orthodontics. Not a promise, but a powerful starting point.
ai.symptom_desc: Answer 5 quick questions and we'll suggest the most likely treatment path — and whether it's urgent or can wait for your next planned trip.

testimonials.label: Patient Stories
testimonials.heading: Real patients. Real results. Real savings.
testimonials.subheading: These are demo placeholder testimonials — real reviews from NZ and Australian patients will be featured here.

cta.heading: Ready to stop putting it off?
cta.subheading: Get a free consultation. Ask our AI first, or speak directly to our international patient coordinator. Your first step costs nothing.
cta.note: Responds within 24 hours · English-speaking · No pressure

footer.tagline: World-class dental care in Da Nang, Vietnam. Trusted by patients from New Zealand, Australia, and 18+ countries.
footer.hours: Mon – Sun: 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Vietnam Time, GMT+7)

booking.title: Book Your Free Consultation
booking.subtitle: No commitment. No flights booked. Just a conversation about your dental goals and how we can help.
booking.name: Full Name
booking.notes_placeholder: Tell us about your dental goals, any concerns, or questions you have...
booking.success_body: Our international patient coordinator will be in touch within 24 hours. You can also chat with our AI assistant any time.
booking.step1: We review your request and prepare a personalised treatment plan
booking.step2: Our coordinator emails you with costs, timeline, and answers to your questions
booking.step3: Optional: video consultation before you book flights
booking.step4: Arrive in Da Nang. We take care of everything from there.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions? Our English-speaking team and AI assistant are here to help — whatever timezone you're in.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.or_chat: Or chat with our AI instantly →
contact.hours: Monday – Sunday, 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Vietnam Time

about.title: About Metal Dental
about.subtitle: Built for international patients. Trusted for over 8 years.
about.story: Metal Dental was founded with a single mission: to make world-class dental care accessible to patients from New Zealand, Australia, and beyond — without the world-class price tag. Located in Da Nang, Vietnam's most liveable coastal city, we've built our reputation on clinical excellence, genuine English communication, and AI-powered tools that eliminate the uncertainty of dental tourism.
about.mission: Every patient who walks through our doors deserves dental care that meets international standards. We believe cost should never be the reason someone lives with dental pain or a smile they're not proud of.

services_page.title: Our Dental Services
services_page.subtitle: Comprehensive dental care for international patients. Every treatment designed around your schedule, your goals, and your budget.
